name: create_post
description: Create and publish a new newsletter post in your Beehiiv publication. Supports HTML content, subject lines, preview text, audience targeting, and scheduling for future delivery.

parameters.name: publication_id
parameters.description: The ID of your Beehiiv publication.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title of the post (used as subject line for emails).

parameters.name: subtitle
parameters.description: A subtitle or preview text shown in email clients.

parameters.name: content_html
parameters.description: The post body as HTML content.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Post status. Options: draft, confirmed (ready to send), archived.

parameters.name: send_at
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime to schedule the post. If omitted, sends immediately when status is confirmed.
